title: Eva Sadamoto Manga Predicting price of full collection
display_title: Eva Sadamoto Manga Predicting price of full collection
wikitext:
[]: Eva Sadamoto Manga: Predicting price of full collection             Quote Post by deeRez » Tue Jan 31, 2012 1:19 pm So once the series finishes, will there be a reprint of all the manga volumes, bundled in an easy-to-get collection in Japan? I'm asking this because I'm not sure if Japan manga production companies like to do bundles, how the pricing is done, or how much do they alter the volume cover art for the bundle. I really hope they keep the bundle volume cover art the same as the individual prints. Or do they make it one thick book with all the stages? Any hows, if all goes well, I'm hoping to get the Japanese Eva manga bundle, shipped to the US. How much do you think the price for this will be? I expect shipping to be like $40... but as for the price of the books, I'm hoping since it's a bundle, that there'll be savings... and not just bundle price = cost of each individual volume added up

[]: Re: Eva Sadamoto Manga: Predicting price of full collection             Quote Post by symbv » Tue Jan 31, 2012 1:40 pm deeRez wrote: So once the series finishes, will there be a reprint of all the manga volumes, bundled in an easy-to-get collection in Japan?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Jan 31, 2012 11:48 pm Assuming I'd like the rest of Sadamoto's interpretation to buy it (I have Japanese Volume 8 And U.S. Viz Volume 1 "Action Edition" and the western-released version.) , I'd probably go with the Japanese editions, myself. (Yay for furigana , lol.) You can currently buy the manga on Jlist and other sites if you look around. A U.S. re-release sure would be nice, but IIRC (bad memory), Carl Horn's uncertain if that will happen.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Wed Feb 01, 2012 3:39 am ^ what is the difference between the "Action Edition" and the regular "western" (I suppose you meant "American", Americans really use these two words as synonyms ) one? EDIT: are they re-print with a different format? I read something about it in the Inuyasha's wikipedia page.
